x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Business rules and ACLs on the task table can intercept or modify AI Agent read/write actions, causing silent failures or unpredictable behavior.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review and reduce custom Business Rules and ACLs on the task table before Agentic AI enablement. Test AI Agent actions in sub-production to identify conflicts. Disable non-essential Business Rules that may intercept AI Agent read/write operations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_fef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca7
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Business rules and ACLs on the task table can intercept or modify AI Agent read/write actions, causing silent failures or unpredictable behavior.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaBR = new GlideAggregate('sys_script');
    gaBR.addQuery('collection', 'task');
    gaBR.addQuery('active', true);
    gaBR.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    gaBR.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaBR.query();
    var brs = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaACL = new GlideAggregate('sys_security_acl');
    gaACL.addQuery('name', 'task');
    gaACL.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaACL.query();
    var acls = gaACL.next() ? parseInt(gaACL.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var risk = brs + acls;
    var actualValue = brs + ' custom BRs on task | ' + acls + ' ACLs on task | Combined risk score: ' + risk;

    if (risk <= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low Agentic AI customization risk on task table (score: ' + risk + '). AI Agent read/write operations are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (risk <= 25) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Moderate Agentic AI customization risk on task table (score: ' + risk + '). Test AI Agent actions in sub-production to identify Business Rule or ACL conflicts before go-live.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High Agentic AI customization risk on task table (score: ' + risk + '). Extensive customization creates significant risk of AI Agent conflicts on read/write operations — review and reduce before AI Agent enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000353</number><order>390</order><remediation_guidance>Review and reduce custom Business Rules and ACLs on the task table before Agentic AI enablement. Test AI Agent actions in sub-production to identify conflicts. Disable non-essential Business Rules that may intercept AI Agent read/write operations.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>fef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca7</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_fef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca7</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table

sys_audit_delete.display_value: Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Agentic AI Customization Risk on Task Table
